name: Duck Creek Insurance Platform API
what_it_does: Duck Creek Technologies REST API for cloud-native P&C insurance core system platform. Enables AI agents to manage insurance policies, process claims, handle billing, support rating and underwriting, and integrate insurance operations into digital customer and agent experiences. Duck Creek On-Demand (SaaS) competes with Guidewire in the P&C core systems market.
use_cases: Managing policy lifecycle from quote to bind from insurance automation agents
Processing claims from first notice of loss to settlement from claims agents
Handling premium billing and payment plans from billing management agents
Integrating Duck Creek policy data into agent portals from distribution agents
not_for: Life or health insurance without P&C workflows
InsurTech startups without carrier Duck Creek implementations
Simple insurance quoting without full core system integration
best_when: A P&C insurance carrier using Duck Creek On-Demand wants AI agents to automate policy servicing, claims handling, and billing operations while leveraging Duck Creek's cloud-native architecture.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Insurance core system operations are regulated. Claims settlement and policy changes have direct financial and legal consequences. Personal insurance data is highly sensitive.

auth.notes: Duck Creek uses OAuth 2.0 with OpenID Connect for API access. Tenant-specific authentication servers. Enterprise carrier access through Duck Creek Developer Portal.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise insurance carrier licensing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise SaaS pricing per policy or per user; annual contracts
pricing.notes: Enterprise P&C insurance core system. Verisk Analytics subsidiary (acquired 2021). Primarily US market. Developer program for integration partners.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise SLA rate limits per client

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Insurance core system — policy and claims operations have regulatory consequences
PRIVACY: Personal insurance data including health and financial information
No public MCP server — enterprise-only API via Developer Portal
Verisk Analytics subsidiary (acquired 2021) — integration with Verisk data products possible
Tenant-specific OAuth servers — authentication configuration per carrier
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Insurance core data. SOC2, GDPR. Personal insurance data — highly sensitive. OAuth2 with OIDC. US-primarily. Enterprise-only.

security_score_components.security_notes: Insurance core data and personal insurance information. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2 + OIDC. Enterprise-only. US-primarily.
